publishedAbstract: - The status of `rook-ceph-osd-prepare-XXXX` pod is `Pending`, and the `rook-ceph-osd-XXXX` pod is not created.- All devices defined by the `StorageCluster` are provisioned as PVs.- There are not enough PVCs for the available PVs.
publishedTitle: rook-ceph-osd-prepare pod status Pending due to missing PVC
